mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u.nickname FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.is_notice = 'Y' ORDER BY b.boardId DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT b.*, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.boardId = b.boardId) as commentCount FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.is_notice = 'N' ORDER BY b.boardId DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE is_notice = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(user_id, title, content, createDate, likeCount, dislikeCount, viewCount, is_notice) VALUES(#{user_id}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, 0, #{is_notice})
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u.nickname FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET viewCount = viewCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE board SET likeCount = likeCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE board SET dislikeCount = dislikeCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE board SET likeCount = likeCount - 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId} AND likeCount > 0
UPDATE board SET dislikeCount = dislikeCount - 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId} AND dislikeCount > 0
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.boardId = b.boardId) as commentCount FROM board b WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.boardId DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET commentCount = commentCount + 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE board SET commentCount = commentCount - 1 WHERE boardId = #{boardId} AND commentCount > 0
mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.boardId = b.boardId) as commentCount FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.is_notice = 'N'
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY b.boardId DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE is_notice = 'N'
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
